rows.label: qev015204_MSG0004
rows.name:
The project to build a large-scale water purification plant
here on Mira has finally begun moving forward![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015204_MSG0005
rows.name:
At first, I thought I would run the project
myself as the leader.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015204_MSG0006
rows.name:
But I decided to leave it entirely to the woman
who led this project to reality... Ajoa.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015204_MSG0007
rows.name:
It seems there are various troubles occurring, but
I'm sure she'll find a way to manage them![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015204_MSG0001
rows.name:
The troubles are gone,
and it seems full-scale construction is finally beginning.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015204_MSG0002
rows.name:
If the facility is completed according to the design,
NLA's water shortage problem will be solved at once.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015204_MSG0003
rows.name: Haha, I can hardly wait for it to be finished![ST:wait ]
